summary: Comprehensive testing of FoodHub food delivery app completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (32/32 tests passed). Frontend core features working well including home page, search, dashboards for all roles. Critical issues found with order tracking page and customer session management.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 when adding new address
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - functionality works but incorrect status code

critical_bugs.issue: Order tracking page shows blank screen, not loading properly
Customer session expires when navigating to restaurant detail page

ui_bugs.issue: Search results dropdown doesn't disappear after clearing search

passed_tests: Home page loads with location bar, search, banners, restaurant cards
Restaurant cards show veg/non-veg indicators and delivery time estimates
Instant search works - shows matching restaurants and dishes
All 4 role authentication flows working (customer, owner, admin, delivery_partner)
Delivery partner dashboard with stats, availability toggle, active/available tabs
Owner dashboard with overview, orders, menu management, restaurants tabs
Search API returns restaurants and dish matches
Delivery API endpoints work (dashboard, available, toggle-availability)
README file exists with complete API documentation
All 32 backend API endpoints working perfectly
Banner carousel with rotating promotional content

critical_fixes: Fix order tracking page - currently shows blank screen instead of tracking interface
Fix customer authentication session management - users get logged out when navigating to restaurant pages
Investigate WebSocket connection for real-time order tracking
medium_priority: Test complete order placement flow once authentication is fixed
low_priority: Update address API to return 201 status code instead of 200

success_percentage.frontend: 75% (core features working, critical issues with order tracking and auth)
